actions.intent: Step 2: Refactor all Foreman StateTree logic from tag-based stubs to SmartObject subsystem queries and worker roster
steps: 2a: Add RegisterWorker/UnregisterWorker + TArray<TWeakObjectPtr<AActor>> RegisteredWorkers to AIC_Foreman
2c: Refactor ForemanEval_WorkAvailability::ScanWorld() — roster + IWytchCommandable for workers, FindSmartObjects for work
2f: Refactor FForemanTask_PlanJob — SmartObject query + capability tag matching
2g: Refactor FForemanTask_AssignWorker — send ClaimHandle + SlotHandle + TargetActor via IWytchCommandable
open_questions: Search radius for SmartObject query in PlanJob — what value? (suggest 5000 units as default)
Step 2 conditions will still fail until Step 3 adds a worker that implements IWytchCommandable — expected behavior
